reference_manifest.title: Reference materials for the AINP-governed AIAP package example
reference_manifest.summary: Protocol snapshot and package template used as local generation references.

references.purpose: Reference basis for the generated AIAP package declaration, agent card and AISOP-style candidate flow.
references.usage: Read as local context when generating or reviewing the example AIAP package.
references.trust_boundary: Integrity snapshot only; not a complete AIAP specification, latest-version proof, external trust proof or runtime execution proof.

references.purpose: Local template for the expected generated AIAP package file set and boundary language.
references.usage: Use as generation scaffolding; do not copy claims that are not true for the generated package.
references.trust_boundary: Template integrity only; not a correctness proof, security proof, runtime proof or trust certificate.
